product.title: [Silver] Small Group of No More Than 13 Guests | Salt Lake City+Yellowstone National Park+ Grand Teton National Park+Salt Lake City-Denver “Canyon Spirit” Rockies to the Red Rocks Rail 7-Day Tour

destinations.spotName: Jackson Town Square with Elk Antler Arches

raw.scenicSpotName: Jackson Town Square with Elk Antler Arches

raw.productName: [Silver] Small Group of No More Than 13 Guests | Salt Lake City+Yellowstone National Park+ Grand Teton National Park+Salt Lake City-Denver “Canyon Spirit” Rockies to the Red Rocks Rail 7-Day Tour
raw.productSpecial:
•  Stay at the Old Faithful Inn—the most iconic landmark in Yellowstone National Park! An unparalleled and unique experience! Best accommodations, prime location, most comprehensive amenities, two consecutive nights—simply unmatched! A worldwide exclusive!
  • Enjoy unrestricted access to both Grand Teton and Yellowstone National Parks for an unforgettable adventure!
  • Explore Yellowstone National Park in depth—cover all must-see attractions and witness diverse geothermal wonders!
  • Exclusive in-depth tour of Grand Teton National Park! Leisurely hikes and up-close views of stunning glacial peaks!
  • From the first to the fourth day, you'll enjoy free bottled mineral water and complimentary snacks, allowing you to replenish your energy anytime, anywhere! You'll also get free rental of binoculars (one per person) to see the stunning views right before your eyes!
  • Board the Canyon Spirit glass-dome observation train for a unique railway experience. Marvel at the rolling desert canyons and majestic red rock formations of the American Southwest while enjoying exceptional service and comfort—an exhilarating adventure awaits!

 

[Canyon Spirit Signature experience]

Custom-designed single-level dome.
Oversized glass-dome windows with top curvature for panoramic views.
Regionally-inspired cuisine with dining service delivered to your seat.
Reclining and ergonomically-designed seating that is pre-assigned.
Superior service experience with up to three dedicated Hosts.
Wide selection of alcoholic and non-alcoholic beverages.
Range of gourmet sweet and savory snacks available.
Outdoor viewing area, revealing wide-open, scenic views.
Hosts share engaging stories about wildlife, scenery, and history en route.
Luggage meets you at your mid-rail journey overnight acoommodation.

 

[Premier upgrade]

Access to our exclusive lounge car, unlocking more space. views and relaxation.
Elevated dining experience with expertly-paired wines.
An expanded service team, with an additional Host in the lounge car.
Offer of signature oooktails, premium alcoholic beverages, and additional gourmet snacks.
An additional outdoor viewingarea for ample observation opportunities.
An additional restroom for added privacy, space andcomfort.

Hosts share engaging stories about wildlife, scenery, and history en route.

Reclining and ergonomically-designed seating that is pre-assigned.

 

*Travel Tips: To ensure a comfortable travel experience, each passenger is only allowed to carry one piece of carry-on luggage (limit: length 65cm*width 45cm*height 28cm and below, refer to the size of a 26-inch suitcase).
raw.departureDate:
05/11/2026-10/05/2026: Monday
For departures in May-June and September-October, an additional peak season surcharge of $406 per person will be applied; for departures in July-August, an additional peak season surcharge of $316 per person will be applied.
Please contact customer service to confirm availability before placing your order.

cost.includesHtml:
1. Transportation expenses during the trip (the type of vehicle used depends on the number of participants on that day);

2. Accommodation during the trip (the number of nights is equal to the number of days in the trip minus one);

3. Chinese and English speaking service personnel (driver + tour guide/driver and tour guide);

4. Breakfast (excluding the sixth day).

5. Canyon Spirit train tickets, including meals and service fees.
cost.excludesHtml:
1. Meals not listed in the itinerary;
2. Round-trip transportation to the original departure point;
3. Full-course driver-guide service fee (Day 1 airport pickup: $10/person/day; Days 2-4: $20/person/day);
4. Personal expenses (such as meals, phone calls, pay-TV, and all other individual);
5. Compulsory and optional items during the itinerary;
6. Other expenses not listed in the included fees.

html.primary:
1. In the event of force majeure such as weather, war, or strikes preventing the tour, the company reserves the right to modify the itinerary. Entrance fees to attractions will be refunded (excluding complimentary optional excursions), but the tour fee will not be refunded.

2. Cancellation terms are as follows:

a. If the group requests cancellation or rescheduling 50 days (inclusive) before departure, 15% of the tour fee will be deducted. Refunds for additional hotel, airfare, or service bookings will be determined according to the hotel or airline's regulations.

b. If the group requests cancellation or rescheduling between 49 days (inclusive) and 31 days (inclusive) before departure, 70% of the tour fee will be deducted. Refunds for additional hotel or service bookings will be determined according to the hotel's regulations.

c. If the group requests cancellation between 30 days (inclusive) before departure and the day of departure, or if a participant fails to attend on time on the day of departure, it will be considered an automatic forfeit, and the tour fee will not be refunded.

d. If your company or guests withdraw from or are unable to participate in any part of the itinerary during the trip due to personal reasons (lack of travel documents, lateness, illness, accidents, etc.), the tour fee already paid will not be refunded, nor will it be compensated with other services.

notices.matterName: 【出行提示】11大國家公園收費政策

html.primary: Starting January 1, 2026, 11 national parks in the United States will implement an additional admission fee policy for non-U.S. residents (Please click the blue text to view). When entering these national parks, park staff may verify visitors' identities on-site. U.S. residents are required to carry valid identification documents, such as a U.S. passport, driver's license, or green card, for verification.
html.secondary: 【出行提示】11大國家公園收費政策

notices.matterName: 【預定須知】海鷗產品（不涉及跨境）

html.primary:
Know Before You Book

1. Customer under 18 years old MUST be accompanied by at least one adult. In consideration of the guest safety, pregnant women are only allowed to join the tour if pregnant for 24 weeks or less by the end of the trip.

2. Please be sure to provide accurate and complete information upon booking. This includes name, gender, valid contact information (preferably a mobile phone), accurate flight information, tour location, etc., This helps to avoid any errors upon the reservation because errors affect travel. Any losses due to inaccurate or invalid information will be at your own cost and the company will not be held responsible. 

3. Hotels have different room types, such as a King/Queen size beds or two double size twin beds. The maximum number of people who can legally stay in a room is 2 to 4 people. According to the requirements of some hotels, each group of guests must bring at least one credit card or debit card that can be used at the destination for check-in procedure. If there is no personal consumption, the hotel will refund the deposit to the card within 7-14 working days after check-out. JUPITER LEGEND Corporation and Ctour Holiday guarantee the number of rooms for guests but does not guarantee the specific room type and location. Hotel check-in time is usually after 15:00.

4. This tour does not accept any City Pass or your own tickets for any of the attractions. Tour attraction admission charges and meal expenses are subject to change at any time without notification. Any purchased ticket cannot be refunded for lower prices.

5. JUPITER LEGEND Corporation and Ctour Holiday have the right to make appropriate adjustments to the itinerary under the conditions of facilitating the operation for the tour group. This, however, will not reduce the items that should be included in the itinerary.

6. During the actual trip, the tour guide or driver has the right to appropriately adjust the tour sequence, stay time or assembly time of scenic spots according to the weather, traffic, and other conditions to ensure the smooth progress of the trip.

7. If any scenic spots are temporarily closed, including on certain holidays, the tour guide will make appropriate adjustments based on the actual situation, which may include viewing from the outside or substituting with another attraction to maintain the richness of the itinerary. Please note that the opening hours and capacity limits of certain attractions and national parks may change from time to time due to health concerns. Should such changes affect the itinerary, they will be considered force majeure. We appreciate your understanding.

8. Children under the age of 8 require a booster seat in order to participate in the tour group. JUPITER LEGEND Corporation and Ctour Holiday provide the rental service for $10.00/person/day. Please make a request when booking the itinerary so that we may have the booster seat ready in advance. Please understand that the violations and fines are borne by the guests themselves. There is no need for a booster seat for bus travel on the day of travel, and the fee can be refunded to the guest.

9. Normal health conditions are required to participate and enjoy our full itineraries. Contact us for specific policies or information regarding passengers with disabilities and the handicapped who do need to provide advance notification to make a reservation. JUPITER LEGEND Corporation and Ctour Holiday do not guarantee a wheelchair lift-equipped bus and/or seating availability to disabled passengers without prior notification and approval.

10. We may alter these terms and conditions from time to time and post the new version on our agents’ website. It is your responsibility to check the [Terms & Conditions] on their website regularly and prior to making a reservation. Unless specifically stated otherwise herein or required by law, JUPITER LEGEND Corporation shall not be liable for any consequential, compensatory, indirect, incidental or punitive damages arising out of or in connection with the performance of its obligations under these terms and conditions.

11. Due to the continuous rise in fuel prices leading to a sharp increase in vehicle operating costs, effective for all tours departing on May 18, 2026, a transportation surcharge of $5 per person per day will be applied to our tour products. The fee will be collected by tour guides during the trip.

Notes:

1) No fuel surcharge will be charged on airport pick-up/drop-off days if there are no other bus services arranged.

2) No fuel surcharge will be charged on days not involving bus services: for example, in Florida-related packages where guests travel to and from the theme park independently using park shuttles, or in train tour packages where the entire day's itinerary is by train without tour guide or bus services.

 

Know Before You Go

1. The maximal waiting time for any late passengers is 10 minutes beyond the meeting time announced by the Tour Guide. While JUPITER LEGEND Corporation makes every effort to provide on-time service, it does not guarantee to arrive at or depart from any point.as a specific time, which may be affected by any number of factors including weather, traffic, strikes, government shutdowns, war or terrorist attacks, or mechanical prob- lems. JUPITER LEGEND Corporation is not liable for any inconvenience or expense caused as a result of such a delay, not liable for the expense of connecting air or train or bus service missed as a result of a delay and not liable for any other travel expense caused as a result of a delay.

2. JUPITER LEGEND Corporation and Ctour Holiday reserve the right, when operating conditions require, transferring passengers from one vehicle to another en route.

3. The following documents are recommended to make your check-in process smooth: A valid photo ID is required to board the bus; We recommend you bring a copy of the email confirmation to board the bus.

4. This product is a group activity. If you choose to leave the group, please inform in advance, and obtain the consent of the tour guide. You need to sign the departure agreement form and the unfinished part will be regarded as your own abandonment. The group fee will not be refunded.

5. Gift items in the itinerary that cannot be given away due to force majeure factors such as traffic and weather conditions or personal reasons may be subject to change. Please understand that the fees will not be refunded.

6. Smoking is prohibited aboard the bus in accordance with Federal law and prohibited in most hotel rooms. Customers are responsible for any penalty charged by the hotel in a non-smoking room at least $250 per night.

7. Pets and animals are not allowed on the vehicle.

8. Only for products with airport pick-up service: only one pick-up service within the free pick-up time range is provided for each room. If it is impossible to arrange due to weather and flight delay, etc., please pay for your own transportation costs.

9. Emergency contact: (Toll Free) +1(866)585-8747.

1. The maximal waiting time for any late passengers is 10 minutes beyond the meeting time announced by the Tour Guide. While JUPITER LEGEND Corporation makes every effort to provide on-time service, it does not guarantee to arrive at or depart from any point.as a specific time, which may be affected by any number of factors including weather, traffic, strikes, government shutdowns, war or terrorist attacks, or mechanical prob- lems. JUPITER LEGEND Corporation is not liable for any inconvenience or expense caused as a result of such a delay, not liable for the expense of connecting air or train or bus service missed as a result of a delay and not liable for any other travel expense caused as a result of a delay.

2. JUPITER LEGEND Corporation and Ctour Holiday reserve the right, when operating conditions require, transferring passengers from one vehicle to another en route.

3. The following documents are recommended to make your check-in process smooth: A valid photo ID is required to board the bus; We recommend you bring a copy of the email confirmation to board the bus.

4. This product is a group activity. If you choose to leave the group, please inform in advance, and obtain the consent of the tour guide. You need to sign the departure agreement form and the unfinished part will be regarded as your own abandonment. The group fee will not be refunded.

5. Gift items in the itinerary that cannot be given away due to force majeure factors such as traffic and weather conditions or personal reasons may be subject to change. Please understand that the fees will not be refunded.

6. Smoking is prohibited aboard the bus in accordance with Federal law and prohibited in most hotel rooms. Customers are responsible for any penalty charged by the hotel in a non-smoking room at least $250 per night.

7. Pets and animals are not allowed on the vehicle.

8. Only for products with airport pick-up service: only one pick-up service within the free pick-up time range is provided for each room. If it is impossible to arrange due to weather and flight delay, etc., please pay for your own transportation costs.

9. Emergency contact: (Toll Free) +1(866)585-8747.

shopify_mapping.title: [Silver] Small Group of No More Than 13 Guests | Salt Lake City+Yellowstone National Park+ Grand Teton National Park+Salt Lake City-Denver “Canyon Spirit” Rockies to the Red Rocks Rail 7-Day Tour
tags: Jackson Town Square with Elk Antler Arches
shopify_mapping.bodyHtml:
Highlights

  •  Stay at the Old Faithful Inn—the most iconic landmark in Yellowstone National Park! An unparalleled and unique experience! Best accommodations, prime location, most comprehensive amenities, two consecutive nights—simply unmatched! A worldwide exclusive!
  • Enjoy unrestricted access to both Grand Teton and Yellowstone National Parks for an unforgettable adventure!
  • Explore Yellowstone National Park in depth—cover all must-see attractions and witness diverse geothermal wonders!
  • Exclusive in-depth tour of Grand Teton National Park! Leisurely hikes and up-close views of stunning glacial peaks!
  • From the first to the fourth day, you'll enjoy free bottled mineral water and complimentary snacks, allowing you to replenish your energy anytime, anywhere! You'll also get free rental of binoculars (one per person) to see the stunning views right before your eyes!
  • Board the Canyon Spirit glass-dome observation train for a unique railway experience. Marvel at the rolling desert canyons and majestic red rock formations of the American Southwest while enjoying exceptional service and comfort—an exhilarating adventure awaits!

 

[Canyon Spirit Signature experience]

Custom-designed single-level dome.
Oversized glass-dome windows with top curvature for panoramic views.
Regionally-inspired cuisine with dining service delivered to your seat.
Reclining and ergonomically-designed seating that is pre-assigned.
Superior service experience with up to three dedicated Hosts.
Wide selection of alcoholic and non-alcoholic beverages.
Range of gourmet sweet and savory snacks available.
Outdoor viewing area, revealing wide-open, scenic views.
Hosts share engaging stories about wildlife, scenery, and history en route.
Luggage meets you at your mid-rail journey overnight acoommodation.

 

[Premier upgrade]

Access to our exclusive lounge car, unlocking more space. views and relaxation.
Elevated dining experience with expertly-paired wines.
An expanded service team, with an additional Host in the lounge car.
Offer of signature oooktails, premium alcoholic beverages, and additional gourmet snacks.
An additional outdoor viewingarea for ample observation opportunities.
An additional restroom for added privacy, space andcomfort.

Hosts share engaging stories about wildlife, scenery, and history en route.

Reclining and ergonomically-designed seating that is pre-assigned.

 

*Travel Tips: To ensure a comfortable travel experience, each passenger is only allowed to carry one piece of carry-on luggage (limit: length 65cm*width 45cm*height 28cm and below, refer to the size of a 26-inch suitcase).

Departure Date

05/11/2026-10/05/2026: Monday
For departures in May-June and September-October, an additional peak season surcharge of $406 per person will be applied; for departures in July-August, an additional peak season surcharge of $316 per person will be applied.
Please contact customer service to confirm availability before placing your order.

Cost Includes

1. Transportation expenses during the trip (the type of vehicle used depends on the number of participants on that day);

2. Accommodation during the trip (the number of nights is equal to the number of days in the trip minus one);

3. Chinese and English speaking service personnel (driver + tour guide/driver and tour guide);

4. Breakfast (excluding the sixth day).

5. Canyon Spirit train tickets, including meals and service fees.

Cost Excludes

1. Meals not listed in the itinerary;
2. Round-trip transportation to the original departure point;
3. Full-course driver-guide service fee (Day 1 airport pickup: $10/person/day; Days 2-4: $20/person/day);
4. Personal expenses (such as meals, phone calls, pay-TV, and all other individual);
5. Compulsory and optional items during the itinerary;
6. Other expenses not listed in the included fees.

Cancellation Policy

1. In the event of force majeure such as weather, war, or strikes preventing the tour, the company reserves the right to modify the itinerary. Entrance fees to attractions will be refunded (excluding complimentary optional excursions), but the tour fee will not be refunded.

2. Cancellation terms are as follows:

a. If the group requests cancellation or rescheduling 50 days (inclusive) before departure, 15% of the tour fee will be deducted. Refunds for additional hotel, airfare, or service bookings will be determined according to the hotel or airline's regulations.

b. If the group requests cancellation or rescheduling between 49 days (inclusive) and 31 days (inclusive) before departure, 70% of the tour fee will be deducted. Refunds for additional hotel or service bookings will be determined according to the hotel's regulations.

c. If the group requests cancellation between 30 days (inclusive) before departure and the day of departure, or if a participant fails to attend on time on the day of departure, it will be considered an automatic forfeit, and the tour fee will not be refunded.

d. If your company or guests withdraw from or are unable to participate in any part of the itinerary during the trip due to personal reasons (lack of travel documents, lateness, illness, accidents, etc.), the tour fee already paid will not be refunded, nor will it be compensated with other services.

Travel tips

Starting January 1, 2026, 11 national parks in the United States will implement an additional admission fee policy for non-U.S. residents (Please click the blue text to view). When entering these national parks, park staff may verify visitors' identities on-site. U.S. residents are required to carry valid identification documents, such as a U.S. passport, driver's license, or green card, for verification.

Know Before You Book

Know Before You Book

1. Customer under 18 years old MUST be accompanied by at least one adult. In consideration of the guest safety, pregnant women are only allowed to join the tour if pregnant for 24 weeks or less by the end of the trip.

2. Please be sure to provide accurate and complete information upon booking. This includes name, gender, valid contact information (preferably a mobile phone), accurate flight information, tour location, etc., This helps to avoid any errors upon the reservation because errors affect travel. Any losses due to inaccurate or invalid information will be at your own cost and the company will not be held responsible. 

3. Hotels have different room types, such as a King/Queen size beds or two double size twin beds. The maximum number of people who can legally stay in a room is 2 to 4 people. According to the requirements of some hotels, each group of guests must bring at least one credit card or debit card that can be used at the destination for check-in procedure. If there is no personal consumption, the hotel will refund the deposit to the card within 7-14 working days after check-out. JUPITER LEGEND Corporation and Ctour Holiday guarantee the number of rooms for guests but does not guarantee the specific room type and location. Hotel check-in time is usually after 15:00.

4. This tour does not accept any City Pass or your own tickets for any of the attractions. Tour attraction admission charges and meal expenses are subject to change at any time without notification. Any purchased ticket cannot be refunded for lower prices.

5. JUPITER LEGEND Corporation and Ctour Holiday have the right to make appropriate adjustments to the itinerary under the conditions of facilitating the operation for the tour group. This, however, will not reduce the items that should be included in the itinerary.

6. During the actual trip, the tour guide or driver has the right to appropriately adjust the tour sequence, stay time or assembly time of scenic spots according to the weather, traffic, and other conditions to ensure the smooth progress of the trip.

7. If any scenic spots are temporarily closed, including on certain holidays, the tour guide will make appropriate adjustments based on the actual situation, which may include viewing from the outside or substituting with another attraction to maintain the richness of the itinerary. Please note that the opening hours and capacity limits of certain attractions and national parks may change from time to time due to health concerns. Should such changes affect the itinerary, they will be considered force majeure. We appreciate your understanding.

8. Children under the age of 8 require a booster seat in order to participate in the tour group. JUPITER LEGEND Corporation and Ctour Holiday provide the rental service for $10.00/person/day. Please make a request when booking the itinerary so that we may have the booster seat ready in advance. Please understand that the violations and fines are borne by the guests themselves. There is no need for a booster seat for bus travel on the day of travel, and the fee can be refunded to the guest.

9. Normal health conditions are required to participate and enjoy our full itineraries. Contact us for specific policies or information regarding passengers with disabilities and the handicapped who do need to provide advance notification to make a reservation. JUPITER LEGEND Corporation and Ctour Holiday do not guarantee a wheelchair lift-equipped bus and/or seating availability to disabled passengers without prior notification and approval.

10. We may alter these terms and conditions from time to time and post the new version on our agents’ website. It is your responsibility to check the [Terms & Conditions] on their website regularly and prior to making a reservation. Unless specifically stated otherwise herein or required by law, JUPITER LEGEND Corporation shall not be liable for any consequential, compensatory, indirect, incidental or punitive damages arising out of or in connection with the performance of its obligations under these terms and conditions.

11. Due to the continuous rise in fuel prices leading to a sharp increase in vehicle operating costs, effective for all tours departing on May 18, 2026, a transportation surcharge of $5 per person per day will be applied to our tour products. The fee will be collected by tour guides during the trip.

Notes:

1) No fuel surcharge will be charged on airport pick-up/drop-off days if there are no other bus services arranged.

2) No fuel surcharge will be charged on days not involving bus services: for example, in Florida-related packages where guests travel to and from the theme park independently using park shuttles, or in train tour packages where the entire day's itinerary is by train without tour guide or bus services.

 

Know Before You Go

1. The maximal waiting time for any late passengers is 10 minutes beyond the meeting time announced by the Tour Guide. While JUPITER LEGEND Corporation makes every effort to provide on-time service, it does not guarantee to arrive at or depart from any point.as a specific time, which may be affected by any number of factors including weather, traffic, strikes, government shutdowns, war or terrorist attacks, or mechanical prob- lems. JUPITER LEGEND Corporation is not liable for any inconvenience or expense caused as a result of such a delay, not liable for the expense of connecting air or train or bus service missed as a result of a delay and not liable for any other travel expense caused as a result of a delay.

2. JUPITER LEGEND Corporation and Ctour Holiday reserve the right, when operating conditions require, transferring passengers from one vehicle to another en route.

3. The following documents are recommended to make your check-in process smooth: A valid photo ID is required to board the bus; We recommend you bring a copy of the email confirmation to board the bus.

4. This product is a group activity. If you choose to leave the group, please inform in advance, and obtain the consent of the tour guide. You need to sign the departure agreement form and the unfinished part will be regarded as your own abandonment. The group fee will not be refunded.

5. Gift items in the itinerary that cannot be given away due to force majeure factors such as traffic and weather conditions or personal reasons may be subject to change. Please understand that the fees will not be refunded.

6. Smoking is prohibited aboard the bus in accordance with Federal law and prohibited in most hotel rooms. Customers are responsible for any penalty charged by the hotel in a non-smoking room at least $250 per night.

7. Pets and animals are not allowed on the vehicle.

8. Only for products with airport pick-up service: only one pick-up service within the free pick-up time range is provided for each room. If it is impossible to arrange due to weather and flight delay, etc., please pay for your own transportation costs.

9. Emergency contact: (Toll Free) +1(866)585-8747.
